tagline: Surety-bond microsite + guided intake for Lilac Insurance.
_notes: Hirobius' first external client (Conrad Milsap / Lilac Insurance, lilacinsure.com). Surety-bond microsite; first external consumer of @hirobius/design-system.
Accent overlay aliases primitive.color.lilac.* (added to base tokens in the same change). Semantic tier only, per R1.
Overlay authored in hirobius/lilac-bonds (design-system/lilac-bonds.tenant-tokens.json); upstreamed here verbatim.
Brand hex #6f3fd4 = primitive.color.lilac.500 (AA for white text on page + card surfaces).
